name: refresh_clinic_booking
description: Complete booking system for REFRESH Clinic with dual facility support (Bratislava and Pezinok). Handles service searches, appointment availability, and booking creation with comprehensive error handling and monitoring. GPT-4o powered service matching with 339+ treatments.

request_body_schema.description: Complete REFRESH clinic booking system with dual facility support, smart service matching, real-time availability, and comprehensive booking management for Bratislava and Pezinok locations.

properties.description: Main tool function - always use 'request_booking' for booking requests
Name of the service customer wants to book
Clinic location: 'bratislava' (Lazaretská location) or 'pezinok' (main facility). Customer must choose one location.
Appointment date in DD.MM.YYYY format (e.g., '15.06.2025'). Leave empty for system to show available slots for soonest dates.
Appointment time in HH:MM format (e.g., '14:30'). Leave empty initially to see available times.
Full customer name for booking - collected after customer selects time slot
Customer phone number in international format (e.g., '+421910123456'). Collected after customer provides name.
Additional notes or comments from customer
